items.name: use-reduced-motion
items.title: useReducedMotion
items.description: Reactive prefers-reduced-motion composable. Every Verve component degrades to instant state changes when it returns true.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: MagneticButton
items.description: A button that eases toward the cursor with a spring, then snaps home on leave.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: ThemeToggle
items.description: Day/night switch: the knob springs across while sun and moon cross-fade with a blurred scale.

items.name: animated-counter
items.title: AnimatedCounter
items.description: A number that springs to each new value with tabular, roll-style motion.

items.name: staggered-list
items.title: StaggeredList
items.description: List items spring in one after another with a blurred rise.

items.name: error-shake
items.title: ErrorShake
items.description: Wraps a field and shakes it on invalid submit. Exposes a shake() method.

items.name: forward-button
items.title: ForwardButton
items.description: Slide-arrow action button — the arrow leads, the label follows, on a spring.

items.name: volume-button
items.title: VolumeButton
items.description: Mute toggle whose icon morphs between states with a blurred scale swap.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: SegmentedControl
items.description: A segmented control with a pill that slides between options. Keyboard-navigable.

items.name: spring-switch
items.title: SpringSwitch
items.description: An on/off switch whose thumb overshoots with a springy settle.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip that springs open after an intent delay and closes instantly.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible panels that expand to their content height on a smooth ease, with a chevron that rotates with a springy overshoot. Pure CSS.

items.name: tag-input
items.title: TagInput
items.description: A tag field: Enter pops a pill in with a back-eased overshoot, × removes it with a scale-down fade, and Backspace clears the last. Highlights on focus-within.

items.name: pin-input
items.title: PinInput
items.description: A one-time-code field of single-character boxes. Each digit pops in with a back-eased scale and advances focus; Backspace in an empty box steps back. Emits a complete event.

items.name: ripple-button
items.title: RippleButton
items.description: A button with a material-style ripple that starts at the exact click point, scaling out and fading over 0.6s inside an overflow-hidden face.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: An infinite horizontal chip loop that pauses on hover, with edge mask fades. The list is duplicated and slid translateX 0 to -50% for a seamless loop. Pure CSS.

items.name: quantity-stepper
items.title: QuantityStepper
items.description: − and + buttons around a number that clamps to a minimum. Each change pops the value with a back-eased spring scale, the pressed button dips on :active, and tabular-nums keeps the digits from shifting.

items.name: filter-chips
items.title: FilterChips
items.description: A row of toggle chips. Clicking one fills it with the accent color, flips its text to the background color, and pops it with a back-eased spring. Multi-select — any number can be on at once.

items.name: hold-to-confirm
items.title: HoldToConfirm
items.description: A circular hold-to-delete button ringed by an SVG progress arc. Hold and the ring's stroke-dashoffset fills over 800ms linear; hold the whole way to fire confirm and flash a green success state, or release early to cancel and snap the ring back.

items.name: focus-blur
items.title: FocusBlur
items.description: A link row that pulls focus on hover: the link under the cursor lifts to the accent color while the rest blur and dim, with an optional dashed bracket that springs in around it. Keyboard focus drives the same state; reduced motion keeps the dim but drops the blur.
